differential_diagnoses: Iron deficiency anemia (occult gastrointestinal blood loss)
Heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF)
next_steps: Complete blood count with ferritin and iron studies
Transthoracic echocardiography to assess current valve gradients and LV function
Cardiac catheterization for coronary anatomy evaluation
Fecal immunochemical test or colonoscopy for anemia workup
Referral for Transcatheter Aortic Valve Replacement (TAVR) evaluation
